title: Google Maps Scraper Input
description: Search for local businesses by keyword or scrape specific Google Maps place URLs. No Google API key required.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Business search query in natural language. Examples: 'restaurants in Tokyo', 'dentists near Chicago Loop', 'coffee shops in Shibuya'. Use specific location names for targeted results.

placeUrls.title: Google Maps Place URLs
placeUrls.description: For direct place scraping, paste specific Google Maps place URLs. Use this when you already know which businesses to scrape.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of business listings to return from search results (1-100). Google Maps typically shows up to 60 results per query.

includeDetails.title: Include Detailed Info (Opening Hours, etc.)
includeDetails.description: When enabled, fetches each place's detail page to get opening hours, price level, and additional attributes. Significantly increases runtime for large result sets.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language code for result labels and descriptions. Examples: 'en' (English), 'ja' (Japanese), 'es' (Spanish), 'de' (German), 'fr' (French), 'zh-CN' (Chinese Simplified).
